text: As I wander through this modern, brightly lit space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. There is an intentional emptiness—open glass, geometric patterns, and the clear echo of my footsteps. The second scene, bathed in the vibrant colors of an R+D exhibit, provokes thoughts about the relationship between humans and machines. I feel a spark of wonder, mixed with a faint apprehension about innovation and discovery. This place invites reflection; I feel like both an observer and a participant in a larger experiment unfolding around me.
